name: Missing Semicolon
description: Detects missing semicolons at the end of statements.
message: Possible missing semicolon at the end of the line.
suggestion: Add a semicolon ';' at the end of the statement.

name: Unclosed String Literal
description: Detects string literals that are not properly closed.
suggestion: Ensure all string literals are closed with the matching quote character.

name: Class Naming Violation
message: Class name starts with a lowercase letter. Java standard is PascalCase.
suggestion: Rename the class to use PascalCase (e.g., 'MyClass' instead of 'myClass').

name: Method Naming Violation
message: Method name starts with an uppercase letter. Java standard is camelCase.
suggestion: Rename the method to use camelCase (e.g., 'myMethod' instead of 'MyMethod').

name: Too Many Parameters
description: Detects methods with more than 5 parameters.
message: Method has too many parameters (more than 5).
suggestion: Consider grouping parameters into a single object to improve readability.

name: Empty Catch Block
description: Detects catch blocks that are empty.
suggestion: Avoid catching exceptions without any handling logic. At least log the error.

name: Missing Exception Handling
description: Detects I/O operations without try-catch blocks.
message: Potential missing error handling for I/O operations.
suggestion: Wrap I/O operations in a try-catch block or add a 'throws' clause to the method signature.

name: Unused Variable
description: Detects variables that are declared but not used.
suggestion: Remove the unused variable to clean up the code.
